title: Editor unlocked
description: You can now write your own ball-drop program with drop_ball().

title: +1 line
description: Increase the main program capacity to 3 lines so one run can release more balls.

title: Aim control
description: Unlock assignment, simple expressions, bonus_lane, and set_aim(value) so your code can steer drops left, center, or right.

title: Bonus-lane logic
description: Unlock if/else so your program can choose an aim from the visible bonus_lane.

title: Helper function
description: Unlock one reusable parameterless def function in a dedicated helper editor.

title: for loops
description: Unlock real Python repetition with for _ in range(n): in both editors.

title: while loops
description: A later unlock for open-ended repetition once more board logic is ready.

title: lists
description: A later unlock for storing and processing small collections in strategies.
